case_title: DANNA DIAZ-NINO VS. ENOC RAMOS JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2008 - CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JAZMIN BERRERA INTERPRETS ENGLISH - SPANISH, SPANISH - ENGLISH ON THE BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DIAZ-NINO, DANNA AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, ENOC RAMOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ-NINO, DANNA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, ENOC RAMOS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ-NINO, DANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, ENOC RAMOS $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-14 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, ENOC RAMOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. JAZMINE BARRERA INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CERTIFED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DIAZ-NINO, DANNA
